scripts.test:baseline: npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck:web && npm run test:e2e:web && npm run test:schemas && python scripts/validate-resource-registry.py
scripts.test:schemas: python scripts/validate-graph-schemas.py tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/synthetic-graph.json && ! python scripts/validate-graph-schemas.py tests/fixtures/graph-provenance/recommendation-missing-source-span.json && python scripts/validate-safety-boundaries.py
